rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HEREEN A. CLAUDIO
rulings.Rulings: continued to 4/23/18 to correct calendaring error

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE FESKO FAMILY LEGACY DATED DECEMBER 26, 2012 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Limit Deposition Subpoena For Consume Records
rulings.Rulings: Denied. The Court does not consider new issues and arguments raised for the first time on reply. In any event, nothing would be gained by requiring a discovery request, proper when made, to be reformatted in light of Petitioner's subsequent repleading of its claims across different petitions. Even if the Court considered the merits of the reply argument, however, the requested information is sufficiently relevant. To the extent Petitioner has any legitimate privacy interests in the requested information as against Respondent, those interests must give way to Respondent's right to inquire into the financial history and records. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. Wednesday, April 18, 2018.
